level_signals: Comp range $85K-$107.5K base, consistent with associate/mid-level IC
Role focuses on execution and analysis rather than strategy leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of P&C experience, with 2+ years of personal lines insurance experience in product development or product management
2+ years of personal lines insurance experience in product development or product management
Bachelor's degree in Business, Insurance, Finance, or related field
Exceptional analytical skills and attention to detail, with a knack for identifying trends and taking action
Strong technical skills with SQL, Looker, or similar data visualization tools, and experience creating reports and dashboards
Ownership mentality and project management skills, comfortable managing multiple complex priorities in a fast-paced remote environment
Comfort working in a tech-enabled environment where experimentation, automation, and data-driven decisions are the norm
Ability to work in a remote environment
Enthusiasm about learning and adapting to the exciting world of AI – a commitment to exploring this field is a fundamental part of our culture

explicitly_excluded: Applicants from Colorado, California, Montana, Hawaii, New Mexico, and Puerto Rico

scope.surface: Lemonade Pet insurance product — coverage, pricing, eligibility, and regulatory approval
primary_metrics_inferred: Impact of product changes on pricing and eligibility
core_responsibilities: Partner with actuarial and underwriting experts to work on development of coverage, pricing levels, and eligibility requirements
Measure the impact of product changes and translate insights into actionable learnings
Collaborate with the Insurance Operations team to facilitate regulatory approval, and work closely with the Product team to implement new features
Research market trends and competitor actions and make insightful recommendations to profitably grow the pet business
Identify opportunities to improve workflows, analytics, and decision-making through automation, AI tools, and emerging technologies

green_flags: Equity mentioned as part of package
AI-first culture explicitly described with context, not just as a buzzword
Clear scope: Pet insurance vertical with defined cross-functional partners
red_flags: No visa sponsorship available — explicitly stated
Multiple states excluded (Colorado, California, Montana, Hawaii, New Mexico, Puerto Rico) — significantly limits remote candidate pool
No nice-to-haves listed — hard requirements are extensive with no flexibility signals
4+ years P&C + 2+ years personal lines is a narrow requirement that eliminates most general tech PM candidates
